description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the frontFittingComfort Wash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not scrub Dry flat/reverse Warm iron on reverse Pay tribute to both the sexes with this grey tee from inkfruit. The unisex graphic on the chest is a great representation of the balance of the yin and yang. Team this cotton t-shirt with faded denims and fashionable lifestyle shoes that are available in a wide range at myntra for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
